title: Jennie Gerhardt
writer: Theodore Dreiser, S.K. Lauren, Josephine Lovett
actors: Sylvia Sidney, Donald Cook, Mary Astor
plot: Jennie Gerhardt is a destitute young woman. While working in a hotel in Columbus, Ohio, Jennie meets George Brander, a United State Senator, who becomes infatuated with her. He helps her family and declares his wish to marry her.
